---
title: "08 Automation And Local Skills"
format: html
execute:
  eval: false
---

## Main Question

How can AI agents assist engineering workflows?

## Local Skills

- `skills/localization-debugger`
- `skills/calibration-checker`
- `skills/regression-analyzer`
- `skills/evaluation-report-generator`

## Engineering Focus

The skills operate on local artifacts: configs, metrics JSON, CSV telemetry, plots, and Markdown reports. They are useful without paid APIs and can later be connected to an LLM workflow.

## Exercise

Run a failure scenario, then use the skill instructions to summarize what changed and which evidence supports the diagnosis.
